profile.name: 周威俊
profile.role: AI专业导师 / 企业数字化增长顾问 / CIO
profile.roleEn: AI Professional Mentor / Enterprise Growth Advisor / CIO

proof.label: 短视频内容生产方法论
面向老板、经销商与业务团队
proof.labelEn: For owners, dealers, and business teams

expertise.title: AI战略认知
expertise.body: 帮助企业负责人看懂AI趋势，判断哪些投入能产生经营结果。
expertise.bodyEn: Helping leaders turn AI trends into practical investment decisions.

expertise.title: 短视频矩阵获客
expertise.body: 把脚本、数字人、拍摄、剪辑、发布与线索回收做成可复制流程。
expertise.bodyEn: Building repeatable systems for scripts, avatars, editing, publishing, and lead capture.

expertise.title: 企业智能体工作流
expertise.body: 围绕客户跟进、内容审核、培训交付和数据复盘设计半自动化流程。
expertise.bodyEn: Designing agent workflows for customer follow-up, content review, training, and reporting.

gallery.caption: AI内容工厂：脚本、数字人、剪辑、发布与线索回收
gallery.captionEn: AI content factory: scripts, avatars, editing, publishing, and lead capture

gallery.captionEn: Enterprise AI growth map: from training to business outcomes

videos.title: 实拍讲课片段 01
videos.summary: 从你本机实拍素材压缩成网页版本，展示真实讲课状态与表达方式。
videos.summaryEn: Compressed from local live footage to show real teaching presence and delivery.

videos.title: 实拍讲课片段 02
videos.summary: 适合客户快速判断你的授课节奏、镜头表现和专业可信度。
videos.summaryEn: Lets clients quickly evaluate teaching rhythm, camera presence, and credibility.

videos.title: 实拍讲课片段 03
videos.summary: 用于展示企业培训、门店获客和AI工具落地的讲解能力。
videos.summaryEn: Shows training capability for AI tools, retail growth, and enterprise implementation.

videos.title: 实拍讲课片段 04
videos.summary: 压缩后的网页版本，保留竖版短视频观看体验。
videos.summaryEn: A compressed web version while keeping the vertical short-video experience.

videos.title: 实拍讲课片段 05
videos.summary: 展示OpenAI o1医疗诊断案例的讲解方式，补充课程专业性与行业案例广度。
videos.summaryEn: Shows how an OpenAI o1 healthcare diagnosis case is explained and expands the professional case library.

articles.title: AI不再是工具，是门店获客生产线
articles.titleEn: AI Is No Longer a Tool. It Is a Growth Line.
articles.summary: 真正的AI落地不是追热点，而是把脚本、出镜、剪辑、分发和线索回收做成稳定流程。
articles.summaryEn: Practical AI adoption means turning scripts, filming, editing, publishing, and lead capture into one system.

articles.title: 照明行业不用AI，未来3年会发生什么
articles.titleEn: What Happens If Lighting Retail Ignores AI
articles.summary: 门店的竞争正在从位置与导购，转向内容能力、数据能力和AI执行能力。
articles.summaryEn: Retail competition is shifting from location and sales scripts to content, data, and AI execution.

articles.title: 视频AI的真拐点：可控、可复用、可规模化
articles.titleEn: The Real Video-AI Shift: Control and Scale
articles.summary: 对企业内容工厂来说，一致性比炫技更值钱；模板化比单条爆款更接近增长。
articles.summaryEn: For enterprise content teams, consistency and templates are more valuable than isolated viral clips.

items.title: IBM发布下一代 watsonx Orchestrate，强调企业级AI编排
items.titleEn: IBM introduces next-generation watsonx Orchestrate for enterprise AI orchestration
items.summary: 企业AI正在从单点工具走向多智能体协同、流程治理和可审计的运营模型。
items.summaryEn: Enterprise AI is moving from standalone tools toward orchestrated agents, governance, and auditable operating models.

items.title: 企业平台继续整合Agent部署、运行和注册能力
items.titleEn: Enterprise platforms keep consolidating agent deployment and runtime capabilities
items.summary: 内容生产、审核、发布和客户跟进会越来越适合被设计成半自动化工作流。
items.summaryEn: Content production, review, publishing, and customer follow-up are becoming natural agent workflow candidates.

items.title: 视频生成研究走向可控运镜与场景一致性
items.titleEn: Video generation research moves toward camera control and scene consistency
items.summary: 对短视频矩阵来说，角色、镜头和风格一致性会决定规模化交付质量。
items.summaryEn: For video operations, consistent characters, shots, and style will define scalable quality.

items.title: AI治理成为企业规模化使用Agent的前提
items.titleEn: AI governance becomes a prerequisite for scaling agents
items.summary: 矩阵内容越多，越需要统一口径、权限、审核和风险追踪。
items.summaryEn: The more content a brand publishes, the more it needs consistent messaging, permissions, review, and risk tracking.
